problem id: c8084977
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  01101110 -> 00111001
  11101111 -> 01111111
  11010101 -> 00010111
  10110100 -> 11010010
  00100000 -> 10000000
  10000000 -> 00000010
  11001010 -> 10101011
  01100011 -> 01001101
  10001010 -> 10101010

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 10001100
